title: Assorted Colored Plastic Glitter Glue Pens, 10 cm (10 Pack) - Safe & Non-Toxic, Perfect for Art & Crafts Activities
features: VIBRANT VARIETY: Dive into a world of color with our 10-pack of assorted glitter glue pens. Our pack includes an array of dazzling colors including black, gold, green, red, blue, blue-green, light green, pink, light blue, and violet hues.

SAFE, NON TOXIC MATERIALS: Craft with confidence knowing these pens are made from safe and non-toxic materials, making them a worry-free choice for classrooms, birthday parties, and family art activities.

PRECISION & EASE: Designed with convenience in mind, each 10cm squeezable pen comes with a twist-top color matching lid, ensuring precise application and making it easy for both young artists and seasoned crafters to add glitter without the mess.

VERSATILE & FUN: Ideal for a wide range of art and craft activities, these glitter glue pens are not just for adding sparkle to handmade cards. Use them for party favors, and any other project that could use a touch of shimmer.

THE PERFECT GIFT: Looking for a unique gift that encourages creativity? Our glitter glue pens is an ideal present for budding artists, craft enthusiasts, and anyone who loves a bit of sparkle in their life.
description: Add some amazing designs while using the glitter glue pens.
